ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station in meters */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station (e.g., phone, email) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, wind speed) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather reading */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that collected the reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date the reading was collected */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the reading (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the reading */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag to indicate the quality of the data (e.g., good, suspect, bad) */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor for better traceability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_readings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_readings" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather reading that this temperature reading is part of */,
  "tempC" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "maxtempC" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Celsius */,
  "mintempC" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Celsius */,
  "WindChillC" REAL /* Wind chill temperature in Celsius */,
  "FeelsLikeC" REAL /* Feels like temperature in Celsius */,
  "tempF" REAL /* Temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "maxtempF" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "mintempF" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "WindChillF" REAL /* Wind chill temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "FeelsLikeF" REAL /* Feels like temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES weather_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_readings" (
  "hum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather reading that this humidity reading is part of */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity as a percentage */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES weather_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_readings" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather reading that this wind reading is part of */,
  "windspeedMiles" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "winddirDegree" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "WindGustMiles" REAL /* Wind gust speed in miles per hour */,
  "windspeedKmph" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "WindGustKmph" REAL /* Wind gust speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* More descriptive wind direction (e.g., NW, SE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES weather_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_readings" (
  "pressure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather reading that this pressure reading is part of */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "pressure_inHg" REAL /* Pressure in inches of mercury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pressure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES weather_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_readings" (
  "precip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather reading that this precipitation reading is part of */,
  "precipMM" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "totalSnow_cm" REAL /* Total snowfall in centimeters */,
  "precipInches" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "totalSnow_inches" REAL /* Total snowfall in inches */,
  "rainfall_rate" REAL /* Rainfall rate (e.g., mm/hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES weather_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sun_readings" (
  "sun_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sun reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather reading that this sun reading is part of */,
  "sunHour" REAL /* Sun hours */,
  "sunrise_time" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  "sunset_time" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sun_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sun_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES weather_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dew_point_readings" (
  "dew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dew point reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather reading that this dew point reading is part of */,
  "DewPointC" REAL /* Dew point temperature in Celsius */,
  "DewPointF" REAL /* Dew point temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dew_point_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES weather_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, locked, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality issue */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather reading with the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., missing data, incorrect unit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, resolved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_issues_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES weather_readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_issues_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather reading that this metadata is for */,
  "meta_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., sensor calibration date) */,
  "meta_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., technical, operational, quality) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES weather_readings ("reading_id")
)
